comments.text: Even though Erdős offered \$10 for determining whether odd weird numbers exist, one can actually claim a \$35 bounty for proving the non-existence of odd weird numbers, by the fact that he also offered \$25 for a solution to #825. EDIT 31-01: this comment was made obsolete very quickly by the solution of #825 by Daniel Larsen! (The site has been updated to address this comment.)
Erdos offered 10 dollars for a solution to the First problem, according to Richard K.Guy. (The site has been updated to address this comment.)
